mapper.insert: insert into stock_check_record (plan_id, product_id, system_stock, actual_stock, diff_quantity, status, create_time) values (#{planId}, #{productId}, #{systemStock}, #{actualStock}, #{diffQuantity}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update stock_check_record
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
